name: DYX TECHNOLOGY PTE. LTD.
notes:
Ensure filters permit AS9584 along paths for AS9244

Established in 2024, DYX TECHNOLOGY PTE. LTD. TAIWAN BRANCH is a telecom neutral network service provider. Formerly the DIYIXIAN.COM LIMITED TAIWAN BRANCH, a based company with 25 years of industry experience, DIYIXIAN.COM LIMITED TAIWAN BRANCH serves more than 2,000 corporate clients and international telecom operators around the world.

Facing global competition, digital transformation is the key to business growth. We have become The Sole Distributor for DYXnet in Taiwan. By working hand in hand with our business partner DIYIXIAN. COM LIMITED, we will continue to provide one-stop cloud network security services to enterprises, promote innovation with customers, and create higher business value.
